text.title: Pre-Commit Linters MUST Run on Staged Files Only Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Every commit takes 30 s as pre-commit lints the whole repo.
antipattern.root-cause: Hook didn't pass staged file list.
antipattern.fix: Switch to lint-staged or lefthook with glob filter.

antipattern.symptom: Custom shell loop misses renamed files; lint passes locally but CI fails.
antipattern.root-cause: Hand-rolled filter; doesn't handle rename or copy edge cases.

antipattern.symptom: Staged-only hooks pass; whole-tree drift undetected until major release.
antipattern.fix: Add nightly whole-tree CI; surface drift weekly.
